layers.name: L1
layers.label: Pre-task Brief
layers.measurement_detail: Only fired/not-fired count. No candidate follow-through, dampening, or non-L1 path promotion metrics.
layers.prior_run_detail: Fired 29/29 but only proved injection, not usefulness.
layers.required_build_action: Add semantic metrics: candidate follow-through rate, agent first-3-file overlap with L1 candidates, dampening detection.

layers.name: L3
layers.label: Post-Edit Evidence
layers.measurement_detail: Fired count, chars, dedup count. No mode tracking or suppression reason distribution.
layers.prior_run_detail: Fired 17/29 tasks, 12 got zero evidence. No post_failure or late_repair modes exist.
layers.required_build_action: Implement three modes (post_edit, post_failure, late_repair), add verification suggestion, track suppression reasons.

layers.name: L3b
layers.label: Post-View Navigation
layers.measurement_detail: Fired count, chars only. No iteration band tracking.
layers.prior_run_detail: 100 fires, 46476 chars = flooding. No iteration decay implemented.
layers.required_build_action: Add iteration decay (reduce output volume in later iterations), implement iteration band tracking, cap per-fire char budget.

layers.name: L4
layers.label: Prefetch
layers.measurement_detail: Fired count only. No token cap tracking, no noise suppression logging.
layers.prior_run_detail: Fired but no semantic measurement of whether agent used prefetch signal.
layers.required_build_action: Add token cap tracking, noise suppression logging, measure agent usage of prefetch content.

layers.name: L5
layers.label: Trajectory Governor
layers.measurement_detail: Hook fire counts and telemetry JSONL. No behavioral impact measurement.
layers.prior_run_detail: 0 new hooks fired despite 211 verification commands. Only reacts to failures, not broad passing tests.
layers.required_build_action: Add unverified-patch detection, fix unsafe_finish to catch broad-pass-only, add broad-test-pass heuristic.

layers.name: L6
layers.label: Reindex
layers.wired_location: scripts/swebench/oh_gt_full_wrapper.py, runs before L3, 120s timeout, mtime validation
layers.measurement_detail: Fired count and ok/fail only. No latency or staleness tracking.
layers.prior_run_detail: Works correctly. Sequence (L6 before L3) verified.
layers.required_build_action: Add latency tracking (time from edit to reindex completion), staleness metric (time since last successful reindex).

layers.name: Hygiene
layers.label: Scaffold Strip
layers.prior_run_detail: Strips scaffold files correctly by observation.
layers.required_build_action: Add count of files stripped per task, log stripped filenames for audit.

layers.name: Meta-Logging
layers.label: Meta-Logging
layers.measurement_detail: ok/(ok+fail) utilization is a fake metric (measures crash-free rate, not usefulness).
layers.prior_run_detail: Logging works but derived utilization metric is meaningless.
layers.required_build_action: Replace fake utilization metric with real semantic metrics: evidence-to-action ratio, agent behavioral change after GT injection.

layers.name: Cost Tracking
layers.label: Cost Tracking
layers.measurement_detail: Per-call cost, model, token counts, reasoning guard.
layers.prior_run_detail: Comprehensive per-call tracking verified in production runs.
